title: BulkySoft Paper Serviettes 2Ply Solid Colour Soft Napkins for Kitchen, Parties, and Events – Rip Proof Disposable Tableware - 33 × 33 cm – 100% Cellulose Pack of 100 Kitchen Napkins - Pink
features: ECO-FRIENDLY NAPKINS: Certified with Ecolabel and PEFC, these paper serviettes are the environmentlly friendly alternative to the usual napkins.
TEAR-RESISTANT: These napkins are durable with embossed edges that prevents them from tearing and ripping apart while usage.
EXCELLENT ABSORPTION: Made with 100% cellulose, these serviettes are super absorbent, making a great choice as beverage napkins.
PERFECT FOR: Their adequate size, high quality, and absorbing properties make them fit for use in parties and events.
DIMENSIONS: Each napkin is sized at 33 x 33cm
description: Keep your hands and kitchen shining with these disposable napkins. Each tableware is made with 100% cellulose, these napkins dispose off easily without harming the environment. The solid colour finish lends attractive appeal to these eco friendly napkin. These kitchen napkins are made to achieve the highest quality to prevent tearing while use. Good looking and tear-resistant, these serviettes are perfect to be used in events and parties to complement your guests’ dining experience. With embossed edges 3 ply build, they are easy to fold and beautifully present. These BulkySoft paper serviettes are available in a wide range of colours to choose from. They are supplied in a pack of 100. The pack is certified by Ecolabel and PEFC (Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification).
